markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content pipeline status, PSEO page design, and January performance.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**PSEO Page Design Approved:** The modular design (full-width header, left-side body copy, right-side widget) is approved for its reusability. The right-side widget will be standardized at the parent category level to minimize maintenance.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline Halted:** Staging for refreshed articles is paused due to a CMS bug causing raw Markdown (e.g., `**bold**`) to render. New articles are unaffected.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**"Comparing Solutions" Format Proves High ROI:** This listicle format drives high engagement (75%) and AI visibility. The team will revisit this content lane, previously paused due to concerns about AI-generated opinions.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [**2026 Goals Session Scheduled:** Next week's meeting is extended to one hour to define quantifiable OKRs for LLM visibility, organic traffic, and conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Bug

  - [**Status:** Naming docs and battle cards are resolved.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
      - [**This Week:** Update articles in the "Franki review" column.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [**Next Week:** Prioritize new triage competitor articles for product team review (Chris, Mehmet).](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [**Blocker:** A CMS bug is causing raw Markdown to render in refreshed articles, halting their staging.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will investigate after receiving a screenshot from Franki.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### PSEO Page Design & Strategy

  - [**Design:** A modular template was presented to ensure reusability for future PSEO projects.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
      - [**Structure:** Full-width header → Left-side body copy → Right-side widget.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The left column is a single rich-text field for simple content updates.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Standardize the right-side widget content at the parent category level.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This approach minimizes maintenance overhead while still providing scannable, high-level information.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - [**Branding:** Dila (Brand Marketing) will review the design for brand consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
      - [**Icons:** GrowthX will confirm if widget icons are from the official gallery; Hyperexponential will provide the gallery if not.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - [**Technical:** Franki will consult Hannah (Framer specialist) on widget implementation effort.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)

### January Performance & New Initiatives

  - [**Blog Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [**High Traffic:** "Will AI take over actuary jobs?"](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
      - [**High Engagement (75%):** "Comparing solutions" listicle format.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This format is highly effective for AI visibility and citations.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [**New Initiatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
      - [**Podcast-to-Blog Pipeline:** A new tool converts podcast transcripts into SEO-optimized blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
      - [**SEMrush Scrape:** A new monthly report will track keyword movement against competitors, focusing on the US market (baseline: 138 keywords).](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [**Check That Tool:** Bailey will demo this new tool for tracking LLM citations, which provides a refined view of competitive presence.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)

### 2026 Goals & Collaboration

  - [**Goal:** Define quantifiable OKRs for 2026 to make the content program data-driven.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [**Collaboration:** Hyperexponential will share its internal content plan (e.g., AI expert video series) to help GrowthX identify strategic opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/h9QvFianGW6xk9ynHnfWwhEuqsQPxnDw?tab=summary&timestamp=2026.0)
